description: CompositionBlack and purple check shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line drywarm ironCrafted from soft cotton and designed with cuts that offer a flattering silhouette, this check shirt from highlander is sure to become a wardrobe favourite.
